emails.subject: JAPRO Gruppen Aktiebolag
emails.body: Martin sent this message to London and Michael advised that Sullivan Cromwell be retained. With respect to interest by the CFTC in the proposed transaction, would you agree that the same law firm advise on that issue as well? Makes sense to me. Also, what is Energydesk.com LImited? Sara Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 11/09/99 10:45 AM Martin Rosell 11/09/99 09:47 AM

emails.subject: JAPRO Gruppen Aktiebolag
emails.body: Per my voice mail. Let me know what you think. SS Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 11/16/99 12:21 PM Sara Shackleton 11/09/99 10:48 AM

emails.subject: Re: JAPRO Gruppen Aktiebolag
emails.body: Re: JAPRO Gruppen Aktiebolag I think S&C is fine they are helping us with CFTC issues related to online trading and Energy Desk.com seems somwhat related. Sara Shackleton 11/16/99 12:21 PM
